scripts.lint:local: python -m ruff check . || echo [Stage 1] Agents lint skipped: install Python deps to enable
scripts.lint:fix:local: python -m ruff check . --fix || echo [Stage 1] Agents lint fix skipped
scripts.format:local: python -m ruff format . || echo [Stage 1] Agents format skipped
scripts.test: python -m pytest || echo [Stage 1] Agents tests skipped: install Python deps to enable
